# **Introduction**  
*Novenary code* refers to a base-9 numerical coding system extended into a multi-layer encoding framework. In a base-9 (nonary) system, each digit can take one of nine values (0 through 8). The novenary framework leverages this higher radix not just for numerical representation but to encode data in multiple *layers* of context.
